name: alfacode-team/php-io-cli
description: Interactive CLI component runtime for PHP microservice and hexagonal architectures.

scripts-descriptions.test: Run the full test suite (Unit + Integration)
scripts-descriptions.test:unit: Run Unit tests only (fast, no I/O, no TTY)
scripts-descriptions.test:coverage: Run tests and generate HTML + Clover coverage reports
scripts-descriptions.test:coverage:text: Run tests and print coverage summary to stdout
scripts-descriptions.phpstan: Run PHPStan static analysis at level 8
scripts-descriptions.cs-check: Check code style without modifying files (dry-run)
scripts-descriptions.cs-fix: Apply PHP CS Fixer rules to src/, tests/, examples/
scripts-descriptions.refactor: Run Rector to apply automated code upgrades
scripts-descriptions.mutation: Run mutation testing with Infection (min MSI 60 %, min covered 80 %)
scripts-descriptions.check: Run cs-check + phpstan + tests (standard CI gate)
scripts-descriptions.check:full: Run check + coverage + mutation (full quality gate)
scripts-descriptions.demo: Launch the interactive component demo (requires a real TTY)

extra._comment2: Applications that depend on this library should add their own 'extra.php-io-cli'
extra._comment3: block in THEIR composer.json (not this file). Example:
